da.hero_subtitle: Kombiner 2 eller 3 kurser og spar op til 15%. All-in inkluderer en gratis 1-måneds pass (værdi 1.399 kr).
da.pricing_subtitle: Hvert kursus er 4 uger med 8 × 90-minutters workshops — en blanding af hot og non-heated sessions med erfarne instruktører.
da.price3_detail:
5.865 kr (-15% + gratis pass)
24 workshops · ~244 kr/workshop
+ 1-måneds pass (værdi 1.399 kr)
da.builder_summary_default: Vælg måned og mindst ét kursus for at se prisen.
da.course_inv_desc: Hovedstand, underarmsstand, håndstand — fra fundament til kreative flows. Styrke, teknik og mod.
da.course_splits_desc: Forlæns og midtersplits. Fleksibilitet, styrke og kontrol. Hot og non-heated sessions.
da.course_back_desc: Cobra, Camel, Wheel og avancerede variationer. Sikker progression med fokus på styrke.
da.accom_subtitle: For studerende fra andre byer tilbyder vi overnatning med fair priser — studio-lejligheder og private værelser i en rolig bydel.
da.cta_title: Din krop kan mere, end du tror
da.cta_text: Vælg dine kurser, byg din pakke og kom i gang.

en.hero_subtitle: Combine 2 or 3 courses and save up to 15%. The All-in package includes a free 1-month pass (value 1,399 DKK).
en.pricing_subtitle: Each course is 4 weeks with 8 × 90-minute workshops — a mix of hot and non-heated sessions with experienced instructors.
en.price3_detail:
5,865 DKK (-15% + free pass)
24 workshops · ~244 DKK/workshop
+ 1-month pass (value 1,399 DKK)
en.builder_summary_default: Choose a month and at least one course to see the price.
en.course_inv_desc: Headstand, forearm stand, handstand — from foundation to creative flows. Strength, technique and courage.
en.course_splits_desc: Front splits and middle splits. Flexibility, strength and control. Hot and non-heated sessions.
en.course_back_desc: Cobra, Camel, Wheel and advanced variations. Safe progression with a focus on strength.
en.accom_subtitle: For students from other cities, we offer accommodation at fair prices — studio apartments and private rooms in a quiet neighbourhood.
en.accom_item4: Retreat-like feel in a city setting
en.cta_title: Your body can do more than you think
en.cta_text: Choose your courses, build your package and get started.
